steps.title: Identify the sequential structure
steps.content: The passage frames a sequence with explicit markers: “First, the turtle will dig her nest” (step 1) and “Finally, she will cover it all with sand” (step 3). The blank needs the transition for the middle step.

steps.title: Choose the transition that marks the next step
steps.content: ”Next” directly signals the second step in a sequence, fitting between “First” and “Finally.” The other three all fail to show progression: “By contrast” introduces contradiction, “Similarly” suggests equivalence, and “For example” offers a specific instance rather than continuation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
